testsuite.name: UT-5: HealthStatusService — Fence Window Enforcement

testcase.name: UT-5b: Usuario PROBABLE dentro de ventana → FenceException también
UT-5c: Admin override → checkFenceWindow() NO se consulta
UT-5a: Usuario SUSPECT dentro de ventana de 14 días → FenceException
UT-5d: Usuario ACTIVE sin fence window → resolución sin excepción

testsuite.system-out: 2026-05-14T22:54:28.251-05:00 INFO 15364 --- [circleguard-promotion-service] [ Test worker] c.c.p.service.HealthStatusService : Resolving status for user: test-anon-002 (Admin Override: false) 2026-05-14T22:54:28.254-05:00 INFO 15364 --- [circleguard-promotion-service] [ Test worker] c.c.p.service.HealthStatusService : Resolving status for user: test-anon-003 (Admin Override: true) 2026-05-14T22:54:28.258-05:00 INFO 15364 --- [circleguard-promotion-service] [ Test worker] c.c.p.service.HealthStatusService : Resolving status for user: test-anon-001 (Admin Override: false) 2026-05-14T22:54:28.266-05:00 INFO 15364 --- [circleguard-promotion-service] [ Test worker] c.c.p.service.HealthStatusService : Resolving status for user: test-anon-004 (Admin Override: false)
